name: How It Works
description: A high-contrast dark section that breaks down a process into simple steps. Features large numeric indicators in theme colors and clear, concise cards for each phase.

field_schema.help: A small, uppercase label displayed above the main heading.

field_schema.help: The primary title of the section.

steps.title: Book it
steps.body: Pick a trip, fill the Vibe Check, pay half upfront.

steps.title: Pack your bags
steps.body: We WhatsApp you everything you need — what to wear, what to leave behind.

steps.title: Eat everything
steps.body: Show up hungry. We handle the rest. Bring an empty memory card.
